## Meeting Purpose

[Regroup to discuss account allocation strategy and team structure for GrowthX Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to standardize engagements and create clear roles/responsibilities for team members](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Aim to develop "pods" with account managers, supporting roles, and writers for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Focus on developing more client-facing account managers who can lead strategy and communication](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Balance workload and account complexity when assigning team members to projects](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Topics

### Current Team Structure and Challenges

  - [Mix of account leads and supporting roles, causing management complexity](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Varying skill levels in client communication, strategy, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Need for more experienced client-facing managers to handle higher-tier accounts](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Challenges in balancing workload and matching team members to appropriate accounts](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Proposed Team Structure Changes

  - [Create tiered system for accounts based on complexity and revenue](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Develop "pods" with 3-4 team members (account manager, support roles, writers)](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Transition strong performers like Andre and Nika into more client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Reassign accounts to better match team member strengths (e.g., technical knowledge)](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Implement bi-weekly call cadence for lower-tier accounts to manage workload](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Individual Team Member Assessments

  - [Andre: Improving but needs coaching on client communication and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Nika: Strong potential for client-facing role, especially for technical accounts](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Bissera: Excellent content skills, needs development in people management](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Sammy: Performing well on some accounts, needs improvement in stakeholder management](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Critique: Better suited for supporting role, working behind the scenes](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### Account-Specific Discussions

  - [Reddit: High-priority account requiring top talent and editorial quality](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Project Mark: Challenges with narrow focus, need to push for broader content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Metadata: Opportunity to develop refresh strategy for mature content accounts](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [WebStacks: Potential churn risk, requires strategic oversight](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### Scaling and Future Growth

  - [Goal to close 2 new accounts per week](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Need to develop clear processes for onboarding new team members and accounts](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Focus on creating uniform experiences for different account tiers](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Importance of providing growth paths for team members to retain talent](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize new team structure with defined roles and responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Implement pod system with 3-4 team members per group](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Develop standardized processes for different account tiers](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Provide additional coaching and support for team members transitioning to new roles](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Reassess account allocations based on new structure and team member strengths](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Create plan for scaling team and onboarding new members as company grows](https://fathom.video/share/EKsEQ5sv4J4q81jJzq8HZTyps6tpZzgF?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
